narrative.headline: What 2016 Kia Sorento owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints dominate the reported issues for this vehicle, with owners describing sudden, unintended acceleration events while the vehicle is stationary or idling. Power train and structural complaints also appear in meaningful numbers, alongside electrical system faults. Across all areas, a subset of reports involve fires or crashes, indicating that some of these failures escalated beyond minor inconveniences.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the engine suddenly revving and the vehicle surging forward without driver input, including while stopped with the brake pedal depressed. · 32 fire · 4 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle rolling away on its own after being parked and exited, in some cases colliding with objects. · 4 fire · 6 crash · 5 injured

issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: Owners report the windshield developing stress cracks spontaneously at highway speeds, typically originating near an edge and spreading across the glass. · 4 fire · 2 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report warning and indicator lights activating unexpectedly, with issues surfacing shortly after purchase and recurring on subsequent visits to the dealer. · 8 fire · 3 crash · 2 injured
